info.name: Pokerank API
info.description:
Pokémon GO companion analytics backend — complete API collection.

## Auth Flows

### Registration (3 steps):
1. POST /auth/register → sends OTP to email
2. POST /auth/verify-otp → verifies OTP, returns tokens + full user profile
3. POST /auth/create-profile → completes profile (multipart: fields + optional image)

### Profile Management:
- PATCH /users/me → update fields + optional new image (multipart or JSON)
- DELETE /users/me/profile-image → remove image (auto-cleans storage)

### Forgot Password (2 steps):
1. POST /auth/forgot-password → sends OTP
2. POST /auth/reset-password → verify OTP + set new password

### Login:
POST /auth/login → returns tokens + full user profile (same shape as GET /users/me)

### Token Refresh:
POST /auth/refresh → returns new tokens + full user profile

## Data Seeding
Run `npm run seed` to populate 386 Pokémon (Gen 1-3), rankings, raid bosses, and events from PokeAPI.

item.name: Auth — Registration Flow
item.description: 3-step registration: Register → Verify OTP → Create Profile

exec: pm.test('Response contains email and message', function () {

request.description: Register with email + password. Sends 6-digit OTP to email. Does NOT return tokens yet.

exec: pm.test('Response has tokens and user profile', function () {

request.description: Verify the 6-digit OTP from email. Returns accessToken + refreshToken. Replace '123456' with actual OTP from your email.
Resend OTP for email verification. Has a 60-second cooldown between requests.

formdata.description: Optional profile image (jpg, png, gif, webp, etc). Max 5MB.

request.description: Complete user profile after OTP verification. Requires Bearer token from Step 2. Send as multipart/form-data. firstName and lastName required. profileImage is an optional image file — server handles upload + attach atomically.

item.name: Auth — Login
item.description: Email/password login

exec: pm.test('Response has tokens and full user profile', function () {

request.description: Login with email + password. Returns tokens + full user profile (same shape as GET /users/me). If email not verified, returns 401 and auto-sends OTP.

exec: pm.test('Response has user object with admin role', function () {

request.description: Login with admin credentials from environment variables.

item.name: Auth — Social Login (Firebase)
item.description: Social authentication via Firebase. Frontend authenticates with Firebase (Google/Apple/GitHub), sends idToken to backend. Handles both new signup and existing user login in one endpoint.

exec: console.log('Social auth — isNewUser: ' + data.isNewUser + ', email: ' + (data.user && data.user.email));
pm.test('Response has tokens, user, and isNewUser flag', function () {

request.description:
Social login/register via Firebase. Supports google, apple, github providers.

- If user exists with that email → logs in, returns tokens
- If new email → auto-registers, returns tokens + isNewUser: true
- If email/password user exists → links social provider to existing account

Replace {{firebaseIdToken}} with the actual Firebase ID token from client-side auth.
Social login via Apple Sign-In through Firebase.
Social login via GitHub through Firebase.

item.name: Auth — Forgot Password
item.description: 2-step password reset: Forgot → Reset

request.description: Send OTP to email for password reset. Always returns success (does not leak whether email exists).
Verify OTP and set new password. Replace '123456' with actual OTP. Invalidates all existing refresh tokens.

item.name: Auth — Token & Session
item.description: Refresh, logout, profile management

exec: pm.test('Response has tokens and full user profile', function () {

request.description: Exchange refresh token for new access + refresh tokens + full user profile.
Revoke current session by sending the refreshToken. If the token doesn't match, all sessions are revoked as a safety fallback. Clears tokens from environment.
Get full profile of authenticated user.

formdata.description: New profile image — replaces old one. Server auto-deletes the previous image.

request.description: Update profile fields and/or replace profile image. Send as multipart/form-data if uploading a new image. Old image is automatically deleted from storage. Can also send as application/json if only updating text fields.
Update profile text fields only (no image change). Send as application/json.
Remove profile image entirely. Deletes the file from storage and clears the reference from the user profile.

item.name: Files
item.description: Standalone file upload and management. Profile images are handled directly by the profile endpoints (create-profile, update-profile). Use this for general file uploads only.

formdata.description: Select an image file (jpg, png, gif, webp, svg, bmp, tiff). Max 5MB.

request.description: Upload an image file. Returns file metadata including the `id` to use in create-profile or update-profile. Supported: jpeg, png, gif, webp, svg, bmp, tiff. Max 5MB.
List all uploaded files for authenticated user. Optional category filter.
Soft-delete a file. File remains on disk but is marked inactive.

item.name: Pokédex
item.description: Public Pokémon data endpoints (no auth required). Detail returns full data: stats, Max CP, Stat Product, fast/charge moves with DPS/Energy, type effectiveness (weak/resistant/immune), full evolution chain with rankings per stage, league rankings with S/A/B/C/D rating, and best use cases (PvP/Raid star ratings).

request.description: List Pokémon with optional filters (type, region, generation) and pagination.

exec: pm.test('Returns array of trending Pokémon', function () {

request.description: Get top-ranked Pokémon across leagues — used for the Trending Pokémon section on the home screen. Returns name, types, sprite, overallRanking, and league.
Search Pokémon by name (case-insensitive, max 20 results).

exec: pm.test('Response has all detail tabs data', function () {

request.description:
Full detail for one Pokémon.

**Stats tab**: baseAtk, baseDef, baseSta, totalStats, maxCp (Lv 40), statProduct, generation, region.

**Info tab**: fastMoves and chargeMoves (each with name, type, power, energy, dps, isElite), typeEffectiveness (weakTo, resistantTo, immuneTo).

**Insights tab**: evolutionChain (ordered stages with name, sprite, generation, baseStatsTotal, stageLabel '1/3', rankings per league), rankings per league (rank, dps, S/A/B/C/D rating), bestUseCases (PvP and Raid star ratings 1-5).
Mewtwo — S-rank across all leagues, 5/5 PvP and Raid.
Get prev/next Pokémon for swipe navigation.

item.name: Rankings
item.description: PvP/PvE rankings — public. List returns spriteUrl, bestMoveset, bestSpread per entry. Detail returns overallRank, typeRank, Performance Stats (DPS, TDO, Best IV Spread), Ranking Trends (historical rank changes with deltas), Top Counters (names + sprites), and Moveset Effectiveness (top 3 combos with % scores).

request.description: Rankings list with spriteUrl, bestMoveset, bestSpread. Filter by league, mode, sort, role.
Ultra League PvP rankings (2500 CP cap).
Master League PvP rankings (no CP cap).

Full ranking detail for one Pokémon.

- **overallRank**: position across all Pokémon in this league/mode
- **typeRank**: position among same primary type (e.g. Dragon Type Rank #1)
- **Performance Stats**: damagePerSecond, totalDamageOutput, bestIvSpread (15/15/15)
- **Ranking Trends**: historical rank changes (Current, 3mo ago, 6mo ago, 9mo ago, 1yr ago) with +/- deltas
- **Top Counters**: 3 best counters with names + sprites (calculated via type effectiveness)
- **Moveset Effectiveness**: top 3 move combos with effectiveness % (e.g. Dragon Breath + Dragon Claw: 96%)

item.name: Raid & Counter
item.description:
Full Raid & Counter module matching the app UI.

**List**: Each boss card shows star rating, types, weaknesses, DPS, TDO, IV spread, league, evolutions/forms.

**Detail**: Boss Moves (Quick + Charged with * for legacy), 100% IV Catch CP (regular + weather boosted), Current Rankings (Overall + Type Rank), League, Potential Forms (Mega/Primal/Shadow), All Weaknesses, 5 Ideal Counters (with Quick/Charged moves, DPS, Survive%, Effectiveness%), Suggested Team (top 3).

**Team Builder**: Save custom counter teams (1-6 Pokémon) via queue endpoints.

item.name: List Active Raid Bosses

exec: pm.test('Bosses have all card fields', function () {

item.description: Raid boss cards: pokemonName, types, starRating (1/3/5), weaknesses, DPS, TDO, ivSpread (15/15/15), league, evolutions/forms, spriteUrl, tier, cp.

item.name: Get Raid Boss Detail (Full)
item.description:
Full raid boss detail page:

- **Boss Moves**: quickMoves + chargedMoves (with * for legacy/elite moves)
- **100% IV Catch CP**: catchCp (regular) + weatherBoostedCatchCp
- **Current Rankings**: overallRank + typeRank (e.g. Dragon Type Rank #1)
- **League**: Master/Ultra/Great based on tier
- **Potential Forms**: Mega, Primal, Shadow, Gigantamax variants
- **All Weaknesses**: computed from type chart
- **5 Ideal Counters**: each with quickMove, chargedMove, DPS, survivePercent, effectivenessPercent, spriteUrl
- **Suggested Team**: top 3 counters (name + sprite) for optimal balance of DPS and survivability

item.name: Get My Raid Teams
item.description: Get user's saved counter teams.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200 || pm.response.code === 201) { const d = (pm.response.json().data || pm.response.json()); if(d.id) pm.environment.set('raidQueueId', d.id); }

request.description: Save a counter team for a boss (Build Your Team screen). 1-6 Pokémon IDs. Team is saved into ranking history.

item.name: Delete Saved Team
item.description: Remove a saved counter team.

item.name: Name Generator
item.description: PvP name generator with template tokens and user presets. Tokens: {Species}, {IV}, {IVSpread}, {League} (GL/UL/ML), {Role} (ATK/TNK/SUP), {Moveset} (FS/BB), {Rank}, {CP}. Auto-resolves Pokémon name from DB. Max 12 chars (Pokémon GO limit).

request.description: PvP Standard preset: 'Charizard_98_GL' → truncated to 12 chars.
IV Spread preset: 'Charizard-15/14/15' → truncated.
Role Based preset: 'ATK Charizard_1500' → truncated.
Moveset preset: 'Charizard FS/BB 98' → truncated.
Rank Focus preset: '#1 Charizard GL' → truncated.

item.name: Get My Presets
item.description: Get all user's saved name presets.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200 || pm.response.code === 201) { const d = (pm.response.json().data || pm.response.json()); if(d.id) pm.environment.set('presetId', d.id); }

request.description: Save a named template for reuse.

item.name: Ranking History
item.description:
Full Ranking History module matching the app UI screens 32-35.

**Battle History Stats**: teamsCount, pokemonCount, avgTeamSize.

**Pokémon Tab (Screen 32)**: Paginated list with tier badge (S/A/B/C/D), types, IV Spread, league, DPS, TDO, Ranking. Filter by tier (S/A/B/C/D) and league (great/ultra/master).

**Detail (Screen 33)**: IV Breakdown (ATK/DEF/HP out of 15), Rank Trend Over Time (line chart data points), Notes & Alerts (meta insights).

**Teams Tab (Screen 34)**: Saved teams with boss name, creation date, member count, and member sprites/types.

**Team Detail (Screen 35)**: Uses Raid Boss Detail endpoint for boss info + team members from saved queues.

item.name: Get Battle History Stats

exec: pm.test('Stats have all summary fields', function () {

item.description: Battle History summary — Teams count, Pokémon count, Avg Team Size. Shown at the top of the Ranking History screen.

item.name: Get Ranking History (All)

exec: pm.test('Entries have enriched card fields', function () {

item.description: Pokémon Tab — paginated ranking history cards. Each card: rank #, name, tier badge (S/A/B/C/D), types, IV Spread (15/13/14), league, DPS, TDO, Ranking. Filter by tier (S/A/B/C/D) and league (great/ultra/master). Enable disabled query params to filter.

item.name: Get Ranking History (Tier S only)
item.description: Filter history to Tier S Pokémon only — best of the best.

item.name: Get Ranking History (Master League)
item.description: Filter history to Master League Pokémon.

item.name: Get History Entry Detail

exec: pm.test('Detail has IV breakdown, rank trend, notes', function () {

item.description:
Screen 33 — Single entry detail view:

- **IV Breakdown**: Attack (X/15), Defense (X/15), HP (X/15)
- **Rank Trend Over Time**: Array of {date, rank} data points for the line chart
- **Notes & Alerts**: Auto-generated insights like 'Strong in current meta', 'Move set Rebalance Impact: +7 ranks'

item.name: Get Pokémon Rank Trend

exec: pm.test('Trend returns date + rank points', function () {

item.description: Get rank trend over time for one Pokémon (line chart data). Each point has date + rank. Lower rank = better performance.

item.name: Get Saved Teams

exec: pm.test('Teams have boss name, members, date', function () {

item.description:
Teams Tab (Screen 34) — List saved counter teams. Each team shows:
- Boss name (e.g. 'Team Created for Gengar')
- Creation date (e.g. 'Fri, Nov 14, 10:30 AM')
- Pokémon count
- Members with name, types, and spriteUrl for avatar display

item.name: Export History (JSON)
item.description: Export all history entries as JSON array — useful for data analysis or backup.

item.name: Delete History Entry
item.description: Soft-delete one history entry. Entry is marked with deletedAt timestamp but not physically removed.

item.name: Recommendations (Chase)
item.description: Investment recommendations — requires auth. Returns pokemonName, spriteUrl, action (EVOLVE/POWER_UP), reasoning, estimatedCp, league, and metaRank from DB. High IV (≥80%) Pokémon at low level → POWER_UP; all high IV → EVOLVE.

request.description: Send owned Pokémon with IVs, level, current CP, and candy count. Returns EVOLVE/POWER_UP recommendations with pokemonName, spriteUrl, estimatedCp, metaRank, reasoning, ivPercent, cost (stardust + candy), and suggested league.

item.description: Public event listing
